title: POV: A new feature enters the chat. 🕺✨
summary: A humorous video post from Google for Developers expressing sympathy for software engineers dealing with new features. The piece uses a casual "point of view" format to engage with developer frustrations.
writeup: This short post from Google for Developers uses a casual point of view format to dramatize the moment a new feature lands on an engineering team. It plays the situation for humor, expressing sympathy for software engineers who absorb the friction that new features bring. The piece is a relatable comedic bit rather than a technical walkthrough, so it carries no specific tools, code, or implementation details.
